comments.author: pfreibauer
comments.body:
i have seen strange ngZone errors in my browser console and so i have tried the solution from 
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/1008

comments.author: wesleysmitthe
comments.body:
> i had the same issue. i could solve it by adding import 'exceljs/dist/exceljs.min.js'; to the polyfill.ts (before all other polyfills)

Thank you so much, that works really good to me.
